title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Arihant Publications - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Arihant Publications - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Arihant Publications invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Curriculum Developer at our Nagpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Arihant Publications:
Arihant Publications is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Support students with special educational needs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Arihant Publications!
